prompt_text:
### Demographics: 62-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.6 kg; Height 166.2 cm; BMI 24.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 207mg/dL; 9 months ago 166mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 160mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.1kg; 9 months ago 66.7kg; 6 months ago 65.8kg; 3 months ago 66.9kg; current 66.6kg), Height (12 months ago 166.2cm; 9 months ago 166.2cm; 6 months ago 166.2cm; 3 months ago 166.2cm; current 166.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 136mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 68mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 8U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.3mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; current 26mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 816mg/g; 9 months ago 1008mg/g; 6 months ago 702mg/g; 3 months ago 951mg/g; current 832mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 160mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 146mg/dL; 3 months ago 165mg/dL; current 153mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.3g/dL; current 9.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
